title: trigonella teheranica
intro: Trigonella teheranica is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly known as the Iranian fenugreek or Persian fenugreek. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trigonella teheranica include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce cholesterol, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and osteoporosis. Trigonella teheranica is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or powder supplement, and its herbal preparations are used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
